name: Ciarán Quinn || Bar Fight
description:
'Cause we find ourselves in the same old mess

singing drunken lullabies

Bar Fight


He's supposed to be tracking down those slimy Belmonts, figuring out just how deep their roots might run in the North East of the States.

But that doesn't mean he can't have a bit of fun too, right?

Seán isn't here to stop him, the amadán that he is.

But he'll never get over the Americans in this town who'd never set foot on Ireland's shores going on about how Irish they are.

He just can't help himself.

Oh well-

He was looking for a fight anyway.

So... I might have been a little neglectful in my posting. But with all the site stuff plus my job announcing more layoffs are coming, I've been a bit frazzled and run down so I decided to let myself just kind of exist and try to not feel pressured to post.

But I'm back and working on my commissions!


This commission is for Kel who wanted to see one of the Quinn boys in Boston!
So here's our favorite felon getting into a bar fight.
Thank you for another commission Kel!



☆ His name is pronounced Keer-awn.
☆ Their crime syndicate is called Donn which means Dark One and is associated with the Celtic God of the Dead.
☆ He's the third oldest brother and yes, they also have a sister.
☆ Ciarán was thrown in prison after a botched smuggling mission. He made a plea deal to reduce his sentence to three years and has now been released after two.
☆ He believes his oldest brother, Seán set him up.
☆ Ciarán is in Boston tracking down the Belmont's activities in the city.
☆ And he just can't help but get himself into trouble.
☆ Your entire backstory is open ended! So enjoy~


☆ Hey! Watch it dude!
☆ Excuse me
creator: m00nprincess
